assignments.name: report_prompt
assignments.value: =You are an AI market analyst for the university career center. Below is raw data from our job market analysis system. Generate a structured weekly report in language: {{ $json.user_lang }}. Data: {{ JSON.stringify($json) }}. Respond ONLY with valid JSON. Keys: executive_summary (string, 3-5 sentences), top_skills_analysis (array of {skill, weight, importance_rating 1-10, why_relevant string}), key_trends (object {rising: array of {skill, change_pct, interpretation string}, falling: array of {skill, change_pct, interpretation string}}), profile_highlights (array of {name string, readiness_score number, recommendation string}), recommendations (array of strings, 3-5 actionable items), market_insights (string, 1-2 paragraphs). All text values in language: {{ $json.user_lang }}.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: $json.report_prompt }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.4, responseMimeType: "application/json" } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-4o", temperature: 0.4, response_format: { type: "json_object" }, messages: [{ role: "system", content: "You output only JSON." }, { role: "user", content: $json.report_prompt }] }) }}
